mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.course_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (title, course_name, content, user_id, like_count, reply_count, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{courseName}, #{content}, #{userId}, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = CASE WHEN like_count > 0 THEN like_count - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_like (post_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
